debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_3
inst✝² : AddCommGroup V
inst✝¹ : Module ℚ V
inst✝ : FiniteDimensional ℚ V
v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)
⊢ IsCompact
    ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
          (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
              (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                      v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range

failed_attempts:
classical
  let R := v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
  let K := v.adicCompletion ℚ
  let L := IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V
  let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let ι := Module.Basis.ofVectorSpaceIndex ℚ V
  -- We induce the product topology on L ⊗ R via the basis isomorphism
  let eR : (L ⊗[ℤ] R) ≃ (ι → R) := (b.baseChange R).equivFun
  let _ : TopologicalSpace (L ⊗[ℤ] R) := TopologicalSpace.induced eR inferInstance
  have : CompactSpace (L ⊗[ℤ] R) := Induced.compactSpace eR inferInstance
  -- We identify L ⊗ K with K^ι topologically
  let eK : (L ⊗[ℤ] K) ≃L[K] (ι → K) :=
    { (b.baseChange K).equivFun with
      continuous_toFun := IsModuleTopology.continuous_of_linearMap _
      continuous_invFun := IsModuleTopology.continuous_of_linearMap _ }
  -- The set is the image of a compact space under a continuous map
  rw [Set.range_comp]
  apply IsCompact.image _ (Aux.c_v V v).continuous
  apply IsCompact.range
  -- The map L ⊗ R → L ⊗ K corresponds to inclusion R^ι → K^ι
  apply continuous_of_continuous_comp_left eK.continuous
  have : eK ∘ (LinearMap.lTensor L (Submodule.subtype R.toIntSubmodule)) =
      (fun f i ↦ algebraMap R K (f i)) ∘ eR := by
    ext x i
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk]
    rw [← eR.symm_apply_apply x]
    simp only [map_sum, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Submodule.coe_subtype]
    rw [Basis.equivFun_symm_apply]
    simp only [map_sum]
    trans ∑ j : ι, eK ((algebraMap R K (eR x j)) • (b.baseChange K j))
    · congr; ext j
      simp only [Basis.baseChange_apply]
      rw [TensorProduct.smul_tmul']
      rfl
    · simp only [LinearMap.map_smul, Basis.equivFun_apply, Finsupp.single_apply]
      rw [Finset.sum_eq_single i]
      · simp
      · intro j _ hji; simp [hji]
      · intro hi; exact (hi (Finset.mem_univ i)).elim
  rw [this]
  exact continuous_pi (fun i ↦ (continuous_algebraMap R K).comp (continuous_apply i))
